DG-LZ-MON.name: dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON.description: dynamic group for security functions execution, required for Logging Analytics

PCY-MON-SERVICES.name: pcy-mon-services
PCY-MON-SERVICES.description: Policy to allow usage of Observability services in tenancy.
statements: Allow service operations-insights to use ons-topics in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read autonomous-database-family in tenancy where ALL{request.operation='GenerateAutonomousDatabaseWallet'}
Allow service operations-insights to read secret-family in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to use metrics in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to read loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
Allow service dpd to read secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security

PCY-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-global-mon-admin
PCY-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-global-mon-admins group users to manage Observability services/resources in tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to inspect all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to read users in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to read compartments in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-platform:cmp-lz-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage opsi-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage management-agents in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to inspect ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage management-agent-install-keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to read instance-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to read instance-agent-plugins in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage management-saved-search in tenancy

PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.name: pcy-mon-dynamic-group
PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.description: Policy to allow the Observability management agent dynamic group to upload metrics and logs.
statements: Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use metrics in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in tenancy

PCY-GLOBAL-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-global-mon-security-admin
PCY-GLOBAL-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-global-mon-admins group users to manage global Observability security resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use vaults in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use keys in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

PCY-GLOBAL-MON-NETWORK-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-global-mon-network-admin
PCY-GLOBAL-MON-NETWORK-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-global-mon-admins group users to manage global Observability private endpoint network resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use security-lists in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use subnets in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to use virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-projects:cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-mon-admins' to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-preprod:cmp-lz-preprod-projects:cmp-lz-preprod-proj1

PCY-PROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-prod-proj1-mon-admin
PCY-PROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow monitoring groups to manage Autonomous Database observability resources in the Prod proj1 compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-private-endpoints in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to use database-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to use autonomous-database-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage autonomous-database-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1

PCY-PREPROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-preprod-proj1-mon-admin
PCY-PREPROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow monitoring groups to manage Autonomous Database observability resources in the Preprod proj1 compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-private-endpoints in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to use database-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to use autonomous-database-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage autonomous-database-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
